name: Northern Sunset
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup glass measure, combine the chocolate powder, coffee, and boiling water.
Stir until the chocolate is fully dissolved.
2. Add the orange liqueur and coffee liqueur to the mixture.
3. Pour the mixture into two coffee cups.
4. Top each cup with whipped cream.
Makes two servings of approximately 3/4 cup each.
